summary: Short, rushed performance with a rare Terrapin encore; matrix recording of unknown clarity.
review: The show is described as brief and feeling hurried, though the reviewer highlights an unusual Terrapin encore that adds a unique touch. No specific comments about audio fidelity are given, so the ultramatrix source’s sound quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; comments focus on a rushed set but note a rare encore, with no recording details to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound clarity or mix issues; therefore quality is assumed average.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Show felt truncated and rushed, giving a compressed vibe despite the special Terrapin encore.
